code: import{useState}from"react";import AuthPage from"./pages/AuthPage";import OnboardingPage from"./pages/OnboardingPage";import DashboardPage from"./pages/DashboardPage";import StudyWithFriendsPage from"./pages/StudyWithFriendsPage";import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[page,setPage]=useState(1);const[aiSchedule,setAiSchedule]=useState(null);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[page===1&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthPage,{onNext:()=>setPage(2)}),page===2&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(OnboardingPage,{onNext:scheduleData=>{setAiSchedule(scheduleData);setPage(3);}}),page===3&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DashboardPage,{schedule:aiSchedule,onBack:()=>setPage(2),onGoToFriends:()=>setPage(4)}),page===4&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(StudyWithFriendsPage,{onBack:()=>setPage(3)})]});}export default App;
